title: Ticket
description: A document or digital record granting the holder the right to travel on a specific transport service or within a defined validity scope.

ticketId.description: Unique identifier or serial number of the ticket

ticketType.description: Type of ticket (e.g. SINGLE, RETURN, SEASON, FLEXI)

validFrom.description: Date and time from which the ticket is valid

validUntil.description: Date and time until which the ticket is valid

fareProductRef.description: Reference to the fare product this ticket is issued under

passengerRef.description: Reference to the passenger this ticket is issued to

resource.description: The resource being accessed against this entitlement
